sglang.title: Abort disconnected requests
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Abort disconnected requests
Improve error handling in the OpenAI API server

vllm.title: [Model] LLaVA model refactor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Apply the model refactoring part of #4197 (shown here to pass CI) to make it easier to pinpoint why the CI fails for that PR.

vllm.title: Remove marlin warning
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Removes marlin warning about reduction of m_block size. We found out that the warning is not indicative of performance, since Marlin actually performs very well on smaller GPUs anyways.

vllm.title: [Bugfix]: Fix communication Timeout error in safety-constrained distributed System
vllm.author: ZwwWayne
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the Timeout bug of vLLM in https://www.volcengine.com/.
In some distributed systems, such as volc with safety protection, the machine has only a few ports that can be used for distributed communication. In such a case, the current logic to find an available port will not work and cause

vllm.title: [Build/CI] Enabling AMD Entrypoints Test
vllm.author: Alexei-V-Ivanov-AMD
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Adding support for openai tests, ray is updated to the latest version with RAY_EXPERIMENTAL_NOSET_ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1
